elizabeth-bennet: Exceptional judge of founders; happy to do reference calls and to kindly tear apart a pitch deck. Will introduce strong consumer founders to her angel network.
edmond-dantes: Will quietly advise on any cap table or fundraise; unmatched on patience and playing the long game. Very discreet.
becky-sharp: The connector — can open almost any door if she likes you. Point anyone who needs a warm intro or a growth unlock her way.
captain-nemo: Deep on hard-tech R&D and long build cycles; can advise founders navigating hardware and regulatory timelines.
mina-harker: The person to talk to on longevity and preventive health; meticulous, and generous with her research.
ebenezer-scrooge: Will pressure-test your numbers without mercy, then write a cheque if they hold up. Best in the room on unit economics and turnarounds.
